extensions.report_wording_note: Markdown explanatory line says characters; authoritative evaluator and JSON metric use UTF-8 bytes.

append_items.title: Review local and project memory sources and consolidate lifecycle procedures
append_items.mission: Review Supermemory Local, ProjectMem, and Cognee at exact current sources and revisions; distinguish conversational memory, project event memory, graph/vector memory, ordinary knowledge, living knowledge, and canonical project records; define privacy, retention, deletion, encryption, embeddings, model-provider, network, credential, multi-tenant, MCP, filesystem, background-process, and synchronization boundaries; inspect existing package memory skills before adding or superseding procedures; create only bounded first-party memory lifecycle or project-memory procedures that remain distinct from the reviewed knowledge-lifecycle, source-first-wiki, second-brain, graph-projection, and agent-handoff core.
acceptance_tests: resolve the exact current repository or primary source for every reviewed system and record revision and license
do not install or execute memory servers, databases, MCP tools, embeddings, model calls, connectors, watchers, or background jobs
distinguish memory from canonical knowledge and record which store is authoritative for each artifact
define consent, privacy, retention, export, deletion, encryption, tenant, credential, and model-provider boundaries
treat inferred entities, graph edges, summaries, and embeddings as derived evidence rather than canonical truth
review overlapping package memory skills and lifecycle guidance before adding local procedures
record lifecycle and installation decisions without rewriting imported package bodies
leave utility evaluation and core promotion as separate later items
